reasoning: Gold chain and warm amber tones align well with Echoes parchment-gold palette. Emerald green gem has decent saturation and pairs harmoniously with the gold. However, the pendant outline/shadow pixels are near-black charcoal rather than colored darks (deep teal, plum, or warm brown) as required. The two dark presentation panels use neutral grey-black backgrounds (~#1a1a1a), not colored shadow darks. The gem green, while acceptable, sits slightly below the BRIGHT/candy target — a more vivid kelly or spring green would better fit the saturated-greens spec. Overall the warm+green core relationship is sound, but shadow color quality fails the palette rule.
